name: ComfyUI Free Memory
description: Free GPU memory by unloading ComfyUI models. Use between image and video generation to prevent OOM errors. Passes through input unchanged.
doc:
Release GPU memory used by ComfyUI models.

When to Use:
• Between image generation batches
• Before video generation (which needs lots of VRAM)
• When switching between different model types

Options:
• Unload Models - removes models from GPU memory
• Free Memory - clears cached allocations

Behavior:
Passes input through unchanged, so you can insert it into any workflow without breaking connections.

Note: Requires ComfyUI server running at the specified URL.

inputs.name: Input
inputs.description: Input to pass through (e.g., array of images)

outputs.name: Output
outputs.description: Passes through the input unchanged after freeing memory
